# Details {#sec-details}

This chapter provides additional details only available in the online version.

See [the introduction](intro.qmd) for the basics and
[literate programming](intro.qmd#sec-literate) for background.

## Extended Discussion {#sec-extended}

For answers to common questions, see [the FAQ](faq.qmd).
The [resources appendix](resources.qmd) lists further reading.
